generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance OccupancyControlActuator : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Building Control System actuator for occupancy-based lighting and HVAC adjustments embedded in the LEED Platinum academic building's physical infrastructure"
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "HVAC system actuator for real-time temperature and airflow control, integrated with BIM for adaptive building management"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureData
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Lighting control actuator implementing dynamic lighting rules embedded in the building's BCS, synchronized with Unreal Engine visualizations"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightingData
]

instance ShadingActuator : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Shading device actuator for automatic sun shading control based on environmental conditions, modeled in BIM for real-time actuation"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureData
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance MotionDetector : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy motion detection sensor deployed in the LEED Platinum academic building to monitor occupancy patterns"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotionData
]

instance EnvironmentalMonitor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT-enabled environmental monitoring device measuring temperature, humidity, and air quality parameters in real-time"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalData
]

instance EnergyConsumptionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Energy consumption monitoring sensor tracking real-time power usage across building systems for operational optimization"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyData
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-precision temperature sensor deployed in critical zones of the LEED Platinum academic building for HVAC system feedback"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureData
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy tracking sensor providing real-time occupancy data for adaptive building control systems"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyData
]

instance LightingSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting occupancy sensor detecting presence to trigger dynamic lighting control based on BIM-defined rules"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightingData
]

instance CO2Sensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "CO₂ concentration sensor monitoring indoor air quality for ventilation optimization in the LEED Platinum building"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CO2Data
]

// C4: Data Transmission
instance MotionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotionDetector
]

instance EnvironmentalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnvironmentalMonitor
]

instance EnergyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionSensor
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance LightingDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightingSensor
]

instance CO2DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CO2Sensor
]

// C5: Data Models
instance BIMStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Static 3D structural model of the LEED Platinum academic building's architecture, containing spatial relationships and component hierarchies from design phase"
]

instance BIMRuntimeMetadata : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Runtime metadata extracted from BIM via model-driven transformations to generate device configurations, control logic, and sensor/actuator interfaces"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RuntimeMetadataEnabler
]

instance UnrealEngineVisualization : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization environment in Unreal Engine 5 that overlays real-time building data for immersive monitoring and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

// C6: Data Types
instance MotionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy pattern data transmitted from motion detection sensors for adaptive building control"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RuntimeMetadataEnabler
]

instance EnvironmentalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time environmental parameters (temperature, humidity, air quality) collected from IoT sensors for building performance monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RuntimeMetadataEnabler
]

instance EnergyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time energy consumption metrics across building systems for operational optimization and benchmarking"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "High-resolution temperature readings from building zones for HVAC system optimization and predictive maintenance"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AdaptiveControlEnabler
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy counts and patterns for dynamic building resource allocation and comfort optimization"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

instance LightingData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Lighting occupancy and usage data for dynamic lighting control and energy efficiency optimization"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightingDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlLogicEnabler
]

instance CO2Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Indoor air quality metrics for ventilation optimization and occupant comfort monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CO2DataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance RuntimeMetadataEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering framework that extracts runtime metadata from BIM models to generate device configurations and control logic interfaces"
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMRuntimeInterfaceService
]

instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation platform for end-to-end BIM-to-DT transformations enabling predictive analytics and performance optimization"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance AdaptiveControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning framework (BOREALIS) for iterative optimization of HVAC and lighting systems based on real-time sensor feedback"
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveControlService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 platform providing interactive 3D visualization of building conditions and real-time operational data"
    DTDFVocab:enables ImmersiveMonitoringService
]

instance ControlLogicEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dynamic control logic framework for real-time adjustment of building systems based on sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlLogicService
]

instance MiddlewareEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware platforms facilitating real-time bidirectional data exchange between physical building assets and digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataSyncService
]

// C12: Services
instance BIMRuntimeInterfaceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that generates runtime interfaces for bidirectional communication between BIM models and physical building sensors/actuators"
    DTDFVocab:provides RuntimeMetadataInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "End-to-end simulation service enabling predictive analytics and performance optimization across the building lifecycle"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance AdaptiveControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Adaptive control service implementing reinforcement learning algorithms to optimize HVAC and lighting systems in real-time"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlOptimizationAction
]

instance ImmersiveMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization service providing Unreal Engine-based 3D monitoring of building conditions and operational parameters"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance DataSyncService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Middleware service facilitating real-time bidirectional data synchronization between physical building assets and digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataExchangeAction
]

instance ControlLogicService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service handling dynamic control logic generation and execution for building systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RuntimeMetadataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time metadata insights extracted from BIM models to validate device configurations and control logic consistency"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Performance analytics comparing actual building operation against design-phase simulations to identify deviations and optimization opportunities"
]

instance ControlOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustments to HVAC and lighting systems based on reinforcement learning optimization algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Immersive 3D visualization of building conditions providing real-time occupancy, energy usage, and environmental parameters for stakeholder decision-making"
]

instance DataExchangeAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Bidirectional data synchronization between physical building assets and digital twin via middleware protocols"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C18: Environment
instance BuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains OccupancyControlActuator, HVACActuator, LightingActuator, ShadingActuator,
             MotionDetector, EnvironmentalMonitor, EnergyConsumptionSensor, TemperatureSensor,
             OccupancySensor, LightingSensor, CO2Sensor
]

instance AcademicBuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical environment of a LEED Platinum academic building containing all building control systems and IoT sensors"
    base:contains BuildingEnvironment, BIMStructuralModel, UnrealEngineVisualization
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals and commands generated by the DT are transmitted back to the physical building via the same middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) to execute actions on actuators (e.g., adjusting HVAC systems, lighting, or shading). This enables closed-loop control, where the DT processes operational data to optimize building performance (e.g., energy efficiency, occupant comfort) in real-time. The framework supports modular service integration, allowing DT engineers to define custom control logic and extend functionality dynamically."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates with continuous real-time synchronization, ensuring live data exchange between physical and virtual systems. While no specific granularity (e.g., 1-second intervals) is mentioned, the framework supports high-frequency updates for critical operational data, enabling responsive control and monitoring."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is a **service-oriented, modular ecosystem** composed of:
  1. A **centralized DT core**: Orchestrates bidirectional data flow between physical assets and the virtual model, using middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) for real-time synchronization.
  2. **Domain-specific services**:
     - **Lighting control** (e.g., TwinLight project): Embedded BIM-based control logic for adaptive lighting.
     - **Energy optimization** (e.g., BOREALIS project): Reinforcement learning models integrated with BIM for dynamic control policies.
     - **Visualization layer**: Unreal Engine provides immersive 3D interfaces for monitoring and simulation.
  3. **External integrations**: Horizontal integration with other DTs or AECO systems via standardized APIs (e.g., BIM standards like IFC). The framework’s extension points enable seamless addition of new services or analytics."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans all lifecycle stages of the physical building:
  1. **Design phase**: Enriched BIM models include device configurations, control logic, and sensor placements.
  2. **Construction phase**: BIM models are validated and transformed into runtime artifacts for automated deployment.
  3. **Operation phase**: Real-time synchronization occurs via middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto), with services like adaptive lighting (BOREALIS) and predictive analytics evolving over time.
  4. **Refurbishment phase**: DTs can be updated or extended to accommodate new requirements (e.g., retrofitting sensors, integrating IoT devices). The framework ensures compatibility with existing BIM standards and AECO workflows."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The DT’s fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  1. **Semantic Alignment**: BIM models are enriched with runtime semantics (e.g., sensor configurations, control logic) to bridge the gap between static design and dynamic operation.
  2. **Real-Time Synchronization**: Middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) ensures bidirectional data flow with minimal latency, reducing semantic drift between the physical and virtual worlds.
  3. **Validation Metrics**: The **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** evaluates the DT’s interoperability and architectural soundness, quantifying its alignment with the physical building.
  4. **Uncertainty Handling**: The framework supports modular updates and service extensions, allowing DTs to adapt to evolving operational requirements without losing fidelity.
  5. **Verification/Validation**: Automated model-to-model transformations and runtime interface generation reduce manual errors, ensuring data integrity."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Technical connections rely on **real-time data exchange protocols** (e.g., Eclipse Hono/Ditto) for bidirectional communication between physical and virtual systems. While specific protocols (e.g., MQTT, WebSockets) are not detailed, the framework emphasizes seamless integration with IoT and BMS systems for operational monitoring."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed as a **scalable, modular system** leveraging cloud/edge infrastructure (not specified in documents). The framework emphasizes **low-overhead updates** via runtime configuration management, enabling dynamic adjustments without redeployment. The deployment is designed for **long-term compatibility** with existing AECO systems (e.g., BIM, BMS) and adheres to standardized extension points for future extensibility."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration supports interoperability with external systems, including:
  1. **Building Management Systems (BMS) and IoT platforms**: For seamless data exchange with operational infrastructure.
  2. **Interoperability frameworks**: Generalized integration with heterogeneous systems to enable cross-domain collaboration."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework adheres to AECO-specific standards like **Building Information Modeling (BIM)** and leverages general-purpose middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) for interoperability. No explicit mention of proprietary standards (e.g., IFC, COBie) or protocols (e.g., MQTT) is provided."
]
